item.title: A few more
item.dc:creator: iamthecomet

item.title: Kareem Abdul-Jabbar sold his 4 championship rings, 3 MVP Trophies and other memorabilia for 2.8 million dollars with the proceeds going to a youth education program.
item.description: When asked why, the hall of famer said, “when it comes to choosing between storing a championship ring or trophy in a room, or providing kids with an opportunity to change their lives, the choice is pretty simple: Sell it all.”

item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: Turned to the Darkside
item.description: Visted a close friend today. We go way back. He always leaned to the right politically, but he jumped the fence to conspiracy land. What I found saddening is that for being a devoted Christian, he has turned away from the "love thy neighbor " to being racist. Russians & Ukrainians shouldn't be fighting each other "because they are white". I don't understand how people become fixated and obsessed with religion and politics. I went to enjoy a visit, not to hear of a new world order or that Satan is destroying the world. (sigh)
item.dc:creator: MrNobodyLivesHere

item.title: And he seems to be very supportive of her! Delighted for her!!

item.title: Haven’t felt this in YEARS
item.description: Met a girl off a Facebook group after commenting on a pic she posted. One month later, we’re planning out 5th and 6th dates. I feel like a kid in a candy store. Been striking out with dates for the past 8 years, finally something goes my way.

item.title: The Top 10 Comics of the Year (So Far) ?

It is the exact half of the year. That means the days are getting shorter again and we're naming the best comics of the year so far! Which was your favourite?
If you'd like to join us through the second half of the year as a confidant, consider becoming a supporter on Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/warandpeas

item.dc:creator: TheWoodsAreVile

item.title: Update on Jasmine
item.description:
My new foster kitten Jasmine had a terrible start to life. She and her three brothers were found alone outside an abandoned house, and she had a terrible eye infection. One of her brothers did not make it, and a vet tech named Jasmine spent hours nursing the other three back to health. Kitten Jasmine has such a severe eye infection in her left eye that the vet today told me she is going to lose it. She has some scarring on her right eye, too, but it’s not too bad. She’s not in any pain that we can tell, so once she’s strong enough, they’ll remove the left eye.
She is doing so well after over a week on antibiotics. I bathed her a couple of days ago, and today she started grooming herself!
She also is not afraid to make it known that she wants delicious num nums.
Yes ma’am, here’s some food. She has a fantastic appetite and is gaining weight every day.
Her brothers are super healthy and way bigger than she is. Since her vision is so bad, she kinda just follows them around with her tail flicking back and forth. She really wants to play with them but they don’t understand she’s slower than them. I threw a noisy ball in there tonight, and she did a great job of pushing it around for a while. You better believe I threw ten more noisy balls in there before I left lol
I really wish I could post videos because I have the cutest vids of her walking around and being precious. I’ve deleted and re-installed the app, emailed the Imgur support inbox twice, messaged @MartynMage and @satan but nothing has worked. A few of you have said that it might work better on a desktop, but mine is currently not working. So it’ll be pictures for now. Anyone have any other ideas?
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) IS ADDICTED TO TEMPTATIONS SEND HELP.

item.title: Just to be clear, I would die for Kevin's right to wear that hat
item.dc:creator: defrostedtauntaun

item.title: Finally got to finish an old game of mine!
item.description: I was told about the emulator for the smart phones called, delta. I was able to play an old game I had as a kid called, “Advance Wars 2”. Never could beat it as a kid but I loved the game. I wanted to know how it ended. Well, fast forward 20 years and I got to do just that. With the emulator’s cheat code input system I finally rushed through to the point I couldn’t beat and finish the story.
item.dc:creator: Hotsauceman

item.title: I Stole This Dump So You Don't Have To. Tuesday Random Meme Dump (no politics, just laughs)
item.description:
1. WELCOME TO DEMOCRACY!
2. Athletes are so greaceful
3. Ooops
4. Dope prank
5. Guy friends: I see no problem here!
6. They called him Tony HAWK
7
8. How's the workout going? Me:
9
10. And Oscar Goes To...
11
12
13
14. "Trust me, Arthur! I have a plan." The Plan:
15. Thank you for making it to the end of this dump, I hope you were thoroughly entertained! I would like to share with you that I'm making a wacky game called Do Not Press The Button, and it's humor and style are kind of inspired by the Stanley Parable. I'm working on tons of fun stuff to do in it! For example: JOINING THE CHAIR REVOLUTION! If you liked the humor in this dump, you would probably like the game. Please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Thank you for supporting indie devs!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Today my mum goes into a dementia care home
item.description:
She was diagnosed with Alzheimer's around 2018 but looking back the signs were there for a good few years before that. My dad has been her primary carer since then and over time she's gotten worse and harder to look after. At this point she often doesn't recognise me or my sister and I suspect is mistaking my dad for her father. She's functionally incontinent so morning and evening he has to wash her with the occasional night time interruption. She can't dress herself or look after herself at all. He finally admitted that it's now too much for him. He's almost 80 and needs a rest. Technically this is a four week respite care stay with the option to extend it but I don't think she will go home again now. I found a nearby care home that specialises in dementia care and a room has opened up for her. Now her sister who lives over an hour away is complaining that it's not fair because "she's not that bad". My aunt rarely sees her and seems to think her opinion on the matter has any bearing whatsoever. Mum needs constant care and she's not going to provid it. This fucking disease took my mum from us years ago and left a shell that occasionally reminds us of how she was. Thankfully my aunt has managed to lose my number and my cousins are not sharing so I only have to hear these complaints second hand.
Layla, cat tax. Poker chips are to stop her turning the PC off when walking over it.
item.dc:creator: Saurbaum

item.title: Debbie Harry on "The Muppet Show" (Wayback in 1981) - In tribute of her 79th birthday today
